{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aethertech augmentation
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila]] has undergone extensive [[Aethertech augmentation]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12">''The Pilot'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
